---
schema: qual/card@1
id: PRB-INDEXP
kind: problem
title: Show a subgroup of index $p$ in a $p\dash$group is normal
classification:
  areas:
  - algebra
  topics:
  - groups
relations: []
review: draft
---

::: problem
Let $G$ be a finite $p\dash$group and $H \leq G$ with $[G:H] = p$. Show $H \normal G$.
:::
